meaning_kannada: ಏಕವಚನ ಕರ್ತೃಪದಕ್ಕೆ ಏಕವಚನ ಕ್ರಿಯಾಪದ, ಬಹುವಚನಕ್ಕೆ ಬಹುವಚನ ಕ್ರಿಯಾಪದ.
meaning_english:
A singular subject takes a singular verb, and a plural subject takes a plural verb.

• Singular: The dog *barks*.
• Plural: The dogs *bark*.

meaning_kannada: ಎರಡು ಕರ್ತೃಪದಗಳನ್ನು 'And' ನಿಂದ ಜೋಡಿಸಿದಾಗ ಬಹುವಚನ ಕ್ರಿಯಾಪದ ಬಳಸಿ.
meaning_english:
When two or more subjects are joined by 'and', use a plural verb.

• Example: Ravi and Somu *are* playing chess.

meaning_kannada: ಎರಡು ಪದಗಳು ಸೇರಿ ಒಂದು ವ್ಯಕ್ತಿ ಅಥವಾ ಒಂದು ಕಲ್ಪನೆಯನ್ನು ಸೂಚಿಸಿದರೆ ಏಕವಚನ ಕ್ರಿಯಾಪದ ಬಳಸಿ.
meaning_english:
If two nouns joined by 'and' represent a single person or a single idea, use a singular verb.

• Example: Bread and butter *is* my favorite breakfast.
• Example: Time and tide *waits* for none.

When subjects are joined by 'or' or 'nor', the verb agrees with the subject closest to it.

• Example: Neither the manager nor the *employees are* happy.

meaning_kannada: Each, Every, Everyone, Someone, Nobody ನಂತಹ ಪದಗಳು ಯಾವಾಗಲೂ ಏಕವಚನ ಕ್ರಿಯಾಪದವನ್ನೇ ತೆಗೆದುಕೊಳ್ಳುತ್ತವೆ.
meaning_english:
Words like Each, Every, Everyone, Someone, Anyone, and Nobody are always singular.

• Example: Each of the students *was* rewarded.

meaning_kannada: 'As well as', 'With', 'Along with', 'Together with' ಬಂದಾಗ ಕ್ರಿಯಾಪದವು ಮೊದಲ ಕರ್ತೃಪದವನ್ನು ಅನುಸರಿಸುತ್ತದೆ.
meaning_english:
Phrases like 'as well as', 'with', and 'along with' do not change the number of the subject. Agree the verb with the first subject.

• Example: The King, with all his ministers, *was* present.

meaning_kannada: ಸಮೂಹ ನಾಮಪದಗಳು ಒಂದು ಘಟಕವಾಗಿ ಕೆಲಸ ಮಾಡಿದರೆ ಏಕವಚನ, ವಿಭಜನೆಯಾದರೆ ಬಹುವಚನ ಕ್ರಿಯಾಪದ ಬಳಸಿ.
meaning_english:
Collective nouns (Jury, Committee, Team) take a singular verb when acting as a unit, and a plural verb when members act individually.

• Unit: The jury *has* given its verdict.
• Divided: The jury *were* divided in their opinions.

meaning_kannada: ಹಣ, ಸಮಯ ಅಥವಾ ದೂರವನ್ನು ಒಂದು ಮೊತ್ತವಾಗಿ ಹೇಳುವಾಗ ಏಕವಚನ ಕ್ರಿಯಾಪದ ಬಳಸಿ.
meaning_english:
Sums of money, periods of time, or distances are usually treated as singular units.

• Example: Ten kilometers *is* a long distance to walk.

meaning_kannada: 'A number of' ಬಹುವಚನ, 'The number of' ಏಕವಚನ ಕ್ರಿಯಾಪದವನ್ನು ತೆಗೆದುಕೊಳ್ಳುತ್ತದೆ.
meaning_english:
'A number of' is plural, while 'The number of' is singular.

• Example: A number of students *have* failed.
• Example: The number of students *is* fifty.

meaning_kannada: 'Many a' ನಂತರ ಏಕವಚನ ನಾಮಪದ ಮತ್ತು ಏಕವಚನ ಕ್ರಿಯಾಪದ ಬರಬೇಕು.
meaning_english:
'Many a' is always followed by a singular noun and a singular verb.

• Example: Many a man *has* lost his life in the war.

word: Plural in Form, Singular in Meaning
meaning_kannada: ಕೆಲವು ವಿಷಯಗಳ ಹೆಸರುಗಳು (Physics, News) ನೋಡಲು ಬಹುವಚನದಂತಿದ್ದರೂ ಏಕವಚನ ಕ್ರಿಯಾಪದ ತೆಗೆದುಕೊಳ್ಳುತ್ತವೆ.
meaning_english:
Nouns plural in form but singular in meaning (Physics, Economics, News, Mathematics) take a singular verb.

• Example: The news *is* too good to be true.

meaning_kannada: 'One of the' ನಂತರ ನಾಮಪದ ಬಹುವಚನವಿರಲಿ, ಆದರೆ ಕ್ರಿಯಾಪದ ಏಕವಚನವಿರಲಿ.
meaning_english:
After 'One of the', use a plural noun but a singular verb.

• Example: One of my friends *is* a doctor.

meaning_kannada: Who, Which, That ಬಂದಾಗ ಅವುಗಳ ಹಿಂದಿರುವ ಪದಕ್ಕೆ (Antecedent) ಅನುಗುಣವಾಗಿ ಕ್ರಿಯಾಪದವಿರಲಿ.
meaning_english:
The verb after 'Who/Which/That' depends on the noun that comes before it.

• Example: It is I who *am* to blame.

meaning_kannada: ಕಲ್ಪನೆ ಅಥವಾ ಇಚ್ಛೆಯನ್ನು ವ್ಯಕ್ತಪಡಿಸುವಾಗ ಎಲ್ಲಾ ಕರ್ತೃಗಳಿಗೂ 'Were' ಬಳಸಿ.
meaning_english:
In sentences expressing a wish or imaginary situation, use 'were' regardless of the subject.

• Example: If I *were* a bird, I would fly.

meaning_kannada: ಲೆಕ್ಕ ಮಾಡಲಾಗದ ನಾಮಪದಗಳು (Furniture, Information) ಏಕವಚನ ಕ್ರಿಯಾಪದವನ್ನೇ ತೆಗೆದುಕೊಳ್ಳುತ್ತವೆ.
meaning_english:
Uncountable nouns like furniture, luggage, information, and scenery always take a singular verb.

• Example: All the furniture *is* new.
